query:
SELECT 
  ql.id, ql.name, ql.phone, ql.createdAt,
  cs.id as sessionId, cs.isBooked, cs.updatedAt, cs.lastActivityAt,
  cs.messageHistory
FROM quote_leads ql
LEFT JOIN conversation_sessions cs ON cs.phone = ql.phone
WHERE ql.name LIKE '%Rohan%' OR ql.name LIKE '%Amy%' OR ql.name LIKE '%amy%'
ORDER BY ql.createdAt DESC;
